title: Prometheus の 500 エラー：原因と解決策
reasons: The article provides an incorrect command for Prometheus TSDB repair, which could lead to ineffective troubleshooting or data loss.
Two Prometheus metric names cited for monitoring are either incorrect or incomplete, leading to potential misinterpretation of system performance.
A specific HTTP status code for queries exceeding sample limits is stated without direct supporting evidence from official documentation.
The explicit causal chain from querying corrupted blocks to a panic and then a 500 error is not fully substantiated by provided sources.
citation coverage is below the threshold
freshness score is below the threshold
one or more claims are unsupported or unverifiable
duplicate source URL for the same claim was ignored
required_actions: Correct the Prometheus TSDB repair command to use `promtool tsdb repair` and specify the correct flags.
Update the Prometheus metric names for 'query evaluation time' and 'number of series retained' to be accurate and complete.
Either provide official documentation confirming HTTP status 422 for queries exceeding `--query.max-samples` or remove the specific status code reference.
Rephrase or provide a direct source confirming the explicit link between querying corrupted TSDB blocks, panics, and resulting 500 errors.
Add links to official documentation or primary sources for key claims.
Review current official docs and update changed API/spec/pricing details.
Add official or primary source URLs for unsupported claims.

unsupported_claims: 破損したブロックに対してクエリが発行されると、ストレージレイヤーで panic が発生し、500 エラーとなります。(If a query is issued against a corrupted block, a panic occurs in the storage layer, resulting in a 500 error.)

データベースの修復を試みる（Prometheus 2.24.0 以降）./prometheus --storage.tsdb.path=<data_directory> --storage.tsdb.retention.size=<size> & (Attempt to repair the database (Prometheus 2.24.0 or later) using `./prometheus --storage.tsdb.path=<data_directory> --storage.tsdb.retention.size=<size>`.)
この値を超えるクエリはエラー（ステータス 422）となるため、適切なバランスを取る必要があります。(Queries exceeding the maximum sample limit will result in an error (status 422), so an appropriate balance needs to be struck.)
メトリクスの監視 クエリ評価時間 prometheus_tsdb_symbol_table_size_bytes (Monitoring metrics: Query evaluation time `prometheus_tsdb_symbol_table_size_bytes`.)
メトリクスの監視 保持されているシリーズ数 prometheus_tsdb_ (Monitoring metrics: Number of series retained `prometheus_tsdb_`.)
